new_content.name: Deltascape
new_content.description: Raid content where weekly restrictions for crystalloid completion rewards have been removed and exchange costs reduced.

new_content.name: Deltascape (Savage)
new_content.description: Raid content where treasure coffers have been adjusted to always drop two items, weekly restrictions have been removed, and area entrance restrictions have been lifted.

new_content.name: Rival Wings
new_content.description: PvP system with adjustments to ceruleum tank spawns, mammet movement speed, and steam cannon actions.

new_content.name: Lost Allagan roborant exchange
new_content.description: Players can exchange Rabanastran coins for lost Allagan roborant.

housing.name: Fat chocobo table chronometer
housing.description: A table-top clock featuring a fat chocobo design. An issue was resolved regarding the incorrect display of its clock face.
